title: LUMOS: A Semantic Operating-System Layer for Accessibility-Grounded AI Agents
innovation_summary: LUMOS: A Semantic Operating-System Layer for Accessibility-Grounded AI Agents: This paper introduces LUMOS (Language Model Unified Machine-Readable Operating-System Semantics), a semantic interaction layer between AI agents and operating systems.
